message.content:
@startuml
participant JCallGraph
participant CliManager
participant MethodCallsList
participant CalledFromList
participant File
participant JarFile
participant ZipEntry
participant ClassParser
participant ClassVisitor
participant Runner

JCallGraph -> CliManager : new CliManager()
JCallGraph -> CliManager : main(args)
CliManager --> CliManager

JCallGraph -> MethodCallsList : getMethodCallsList()
MethodCallsList --> JCallGraph : MethodCallsList

JCallGraph -> File : new File
File --> JCallGraph : File

JCallGraph -> JarFile : new JarFile(File)
JarFile --> JCallGraph : JarFile

JCallGraph -> JarFile : enumerationAsStream(Enumeration<T> e)
JarFile --> JCallGraph : note right: Jar en formato stream

loop [forEach]
  alt [isDirectory() and getName().endsWith(".class")]
    JCallGraph -> ClassParser : new ClassParser(String, String)
    ClassParser --> JCallGraph : cp = ClassParser

    JCallGraph -> ClassParser : getClassVisitor()
    ClassParser --> JCallGraph

    JCallGraph -> ClassVisitor : apply(ClassParser)

    JCallGraph -> ClassVisitor : start()
    ClassVisitor --> JCallGraph : HashMap<MethodReport, List<MethodReport>>

    alt [!= null]
      JCallGraph -> MethodCallsList : add(HashMap<MethodReport, List<MethodReport>>)
    end
  end
end

JCallGraph -> Runner : main(String[])

JCallGraph -> Runner : exportFiles();
Runner --> JCallGraph

....[catch]....

JCallGraph -> JCallGraph : printStackTrace()
JCallGraph --> JCallGraph

@enduml
